## What do you want to do

<!-- Describe the outcome, not a specific implementation. "I want to process 10 files in a batch" not "add a --batch flag". -->

## Why

<!-- What's your use case? What's annoying about the current workflow? -->

## Sketch (optional)

<!-- If you already have an implementation in mind, share it. Otherwise skip. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Did you try working around this with existing flags or other tools? What worked or didn't? -->
